docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY APPELLANT NAYLOR, JACQUELINE MAILED TO RESPONDENT MANN, LAWRENCE

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT APPELLANT NAYLOR, JACQUELINE TAKE NOTHING FROM RESPONDENT MANN, LAWRENCE JUDGMENT IS ORDERED IN FAVOR OF JACQUELINE NAYLOR AND AGAINST LAWRENCE MANN. TOTAL JUDGMENT IS $0.00. THE JUDGMENT ON APPEAL IS FINAL AND REPLACES THE SMALL CLAIMS JUDGMENT OF MARCH 7, 2014. EXHIBIT ARE ORDERED RETURNED PURSUANT TO CCP 1952. calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Apr-17-2014 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 9:25am

Judge Pro Tem Robert Stumpf, clerk Jean Kong, D525, not reported
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal.
Appellant, Jacqueline Naylor appears with counsel Allan Jay Schwartz; Respondent, Lawrence Mann appears as pro per with witness, Maria Capases, office manager . Parties, previously sworn, respectively present their cases in the narrative, and respond to questions from Judge Stumpf.

Respondent Lawrence Mann examines his witness, Maria Capases;cross-examines by Appellant Counsel, Schwartz to respondent's witness Maria Capases.

Appellant Counsel Mr. Schwartz examins his clieant/appellant, Ms. Naylor;cross-examines by respondent, Lawrence Mann to appellant, Jacqueline Naylor.

EXHR - SIGNED MONTHLY LEASE/ VARIOUS EXHIBITS DOCUMENTS.
EXHA - PACKAGE OF VARIOUS EXHIBITS (PERSONALCALENDAR RENT, COPIES OF CANCELLED CHECKS/RECEIPT OF WITHDRAWL FROM BANK, PHOTOS OF MAIL BOX, ETC.)

closing statement by both counsels.

10:35am
Matter is submitted. Newly unmarked evidence retained.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Mar-07-2014 Judgment Entered
